source: Rebuilt using verified DDL (DDL_Tables.zip / DDLS.zip) and verified FK/PK constraints from SIT export (First_Query_results_in_SIT.xlsx / 2_query_results_in_SIT.xlsx) - replaces earlier generic PROVIDER/PROVIDER_TAXONOMY/PROVIDER_ADDRESS/PROVIDER_LICENSE table names with real schema.
important_notes: There is NO provider address table in this schema. Address/contact data lives in an external Contact Management module, linked via p_dtl_tb.g_cmn_enty_sk. SCN-007 has been rewritten to reflect this - it cannot be tested from Provider tables alone.
NPI is stored as a row in p_alt_id_tb (p_alt_id_ty_cd = 'NPI'), not as a column on p_dtl_tb.
Every child table's real primary key is composite: (p_sys_id, its own _sk surrogate key) - e.g. p_txnmy_tb is keyed by (p_sys_id, p_txnmy_sk), not p_sys_id alone.
Coded fields (status, type, taxonomy, etc.) validate against R_VV_TB (composite key: R_VV_DOMAIN_NAM + R_VV_CD), not a single-column code table.

scenarios.name: Provider Creation
scenarios.description: Create a new individual or organizational provider record and bring it to Active status
insert_sequence: Insert parent record into p_dtl_tb, capture generated p_sys_id
Insert into p_ty_tb using p_sys_id + new p_ty_sk (Provider Type)
Insert into p_txnmy_tb using p_sys_id + new p_txnmy_sk (Taxonomy - HIPAA required)
Insert into p_specl_tb using p_sys_id + new p_specl_sk (Specialty)
Insert into p_lic_cert_tb using p_sys_id + new p_lic_cert_sk (License/Certification)
Insert into p_enrol_stat_tb using p_sys_id + new p_enrol_stat_sk, p_enrol_stat_ty_cd = 'AC' (sets Active)
Insert into p_alt_id_tb using p_sys_id + new p_alt_id_sk, p_alt_id_ty_cd = 'NPI' (NPI is stored as an alternate ID row, not a p_dtl_tb column)
Insert into p_appl_stat_tb using p_sys_id + new p_appl_stat_sk, p_appl_stat_cd = 'APR' (Approved)
business_validations: Provider cannot be considered Active without rows in p_ty_tb, p_txnmy_tb, p_specl_tb, p_lic_cert_tb, and an Active row in p_enrol_stat_tb
NPI value in p_alt_id_tb must be exactly 10 numeric digits
p_sys_id must be unique across p_dtl_tb
All coded fields must resolve to a valid (domain, code) pair in R_VV_TB
Do not attempt to insert address data into any table in this list - it is out of scope, see important_notes
scenarios.expected_outcome: New p_dtl_tb record with Active status in p_enrol_stat_tb and all six required child rows present

scenarios.name: Provider Update
scenarios.description: Update demographic details for an existing provider
insert_sequence: Confirm p_sys_id exists in p_dtl_tb and current enrollment status is not Terminated
Update p_dtl_tb demographic columns (e.g. p_nam, p_last_nam, p_first_nam, p_dba_nam) for the matching p_sys_id
business_validations: p_sys_id must already exist in p_dtl_tb
Current row in p_enrol_stat_tb must not have p_enrol_stat_ty_cd = 'TM' (Terminated)
scenarios.expected_outcome: p_dtl_tb record updated in place; g_aud_ts/g_aud_user_id reflect the change

scenarios.name: Provider Taxonomy Change
scenarios.description: Add or end-date a specialty taxonomy code for a provider
insert_sequence: Update the existing active p_txnmy_tb row: set p_txnmy_end_dt = new end date
Insert a new p_txnmy_tb row using p_sys_id + new p_txnmy_sk with the new p_txnmy_cd and p_txnmy_beg_dt = new begin date
business_validations: p_txnmy_cd must be a valid NUCC taxonomy code (validated against SYSTEM_LISTTB - R_LIST_HDR_TB/R_LIST_DTL_TB)
Provider's current p_enrol_stat_tb row must be Active (p_enrol_stat_ty_cd = 'AC')
New p_txnmy_beg_dt must not be earlier than the prior row's p_txnmy_end_dt
scenarios.expected_outcome: Prior taxonomy row end-dated, new taxonomy row inserted with its own p_txnmy_sk

scenarios.name: Provider Termination
insert_sequence: End-date the current Active row in p_enrol_stat_tb: set p_enrol_stat_end_dt = termination date
Insert a new p_enrol_stat_tb row using p_sys_id + new p_enrol_stat_sk, p_enrol_stat_ty_cd = 'TM' (Terminated), p_enrol_stat_beg_dt = termination date
business_validations: Provider's current status must be Active before termination
p_enrol_stat_beg_dt for the new Terminated row is required
New status row's p_enrol_stat_beg_dt must not precede the prior row's p_enrol_stat_beg_dt
scenarios.expected_outcome: New p_enrol_stat_tb row with p_enrol_stat_ty_cd = 'TM' and termination date recorded; prior Active row end-dated

scenarios.name: Provider Enrollment
scenarios.description: Move a provider from Pending/Application to Active enrollment status
insert_sequence: Confirm p_lic_cert_tb has a row with p_lic_vrfy_ind = 'Y' for this p_sys_id
Insert into p_enrol_stat_tb using p_sys_id + new p_enrol_stat_sk, p_enrol_stat_ty_cd = 'AC'
Insert into p_appl_stat_tb using p_sys_id + new p_appl_stat_sk, p_appl_stat_cd = 'APR'
business_validations: A verified license (p_lic_vrfy_ind = 'Y') must exist in p_lic_cert_tb before enrollment can proceed
p_enrol_stat_beg_dt is required on the new Active row
p_rtrctv_elig_ind should be set explicitly ('Y' or 'N'), not left null, if retroactive eligibility applies
scenarios.expected_outcome: New p_enrol_stat_tb row with p_enrol_stat_ty_cd = 'AC' and matching p_appl_stat_tb row showing Approved

scenarios.name: Provider Revalidation
scenarios.description: Periodic re-verification of provider credentials per CMS requirements
insert_sequence: Check R_PARAM_TB / R_PARAM_DTL_TB for the configured revalidation cycle length parameter
Confirm p_lic_cert_tb's current row has p_lic_cert_end_dt in the future (not expired)
Confirm p_txnmy_tb's current row is still active (p_txnmy_end_dt in the future or default '31-DEC-9999')
If both checks pass, no status change needed; if either fails, insert a new p_enrol_stat_tb row with p_enrol_stat_ty_cd flagged for revalidation review
business_validations: License must not be expired at time of revalidation
Taxonomy code must still be active
Revalidation cycle length is a configurable value from R_PARAM_TB, not hardcoded
scenarios.expected_outcome: Provider confirmed Active (no new row needed) or a new p_enrol_stat_tb row flagging revalidation required

scenarios.name: Provider Address Change
scenarios.description: OUT OF SCOPE for this table set - address/contact data is managed by an external Contact Management module
insert_sequence: Do NOT insert address data into any table in this schema
p_dtl_tb.g_cmn_enty_sk points to the external Contact Management module where address changes actually occur
If your sandbox needs to test address scenarios, request DDL for the Contact Management module separately
business_validations: This scenario cannot be fully executed using only the Provider DDL currently loaded
scenarios.expected_outcome: N/A within this module - flagged as a known gap, not a working scenario

scenarios.name: Provider License Verification
scenarios.description: Validate a provider's license status and expiration
insert_sequence: Read current p_lic_cert_tb row for the provider's p_sys_id
If p_lic_cert_end_dt is in the future, update p_lic_vrfy_ind = 'Y'
If p_lic_cert_end_dt is in the past, leave p_lic_vrfy_ind = 'N' and flag as Expired
business_validations: p_lic_cert_num format must be valid for p_lic_cert_state_cd's issuing state
p_lic_cert_end_dt must be evaluated against CURRENT_DATE, not assumed
scenarios.expected_outcome: p_lic_vrfy_ind set to 'Y' (Verified) or left 'N' with the license flagged Expired

scenarios.name: Provider Network/Group Affiliation Change
scenarios.description: Add or end-date a provider's affiliation with a group or managed care network
insert_sequence: Confirm both p_grp_sys_id (the group) and p_mbr_sys_id (the individual member) already exist as valid p_sys_id values in p_dtl_tb
Insert into p_affl_tb linking p_grp_sys_id and p_mbr_sys_id
Insert matching extension row into p_affl_tx if additional affiliation attributes are required
To remove an affiliation, end-date the existing p_affl_tb row rather than deleting it
business_validations: Both referenced p_sys_id values must already exist in p_dtl_tb
The group-side provider (p_grp_sys_id) should have p_indiv_grp_cd = 'G' on p_dtl_tb
The member-side provider (p_mbr_sys_id) should have p_indiv_grp_cd = 'I' on p_dtl_tb
scenarios.expected_outcome: New p_affl_tb row linking the two providers, or an end-dated row if removing an affiliation

scenarios.name: Provider Deactivation and Reactivation
scenarios.description: Temporarily deactivate a provider and later reinstate enrollment
insert_sequence: Deactivation: end-date the current Active p_enrol_stat_tb row, insert a new row with p_enrol_stat_ty_cd = 'IN' (Inactive) and a p_enrol_stat_rsn_cd explaining why
Reactivation: end-date the Inactive row, insert a new row with p_enrol_stat_ty_cd = 'AC' - only after a status review is completed
business_validations: Deactivation requires a non-null p_enrol_stat_rsn_cd
Reactivation should not be performed by simply flipping the code back - a new dated row is required to preserve status history
Each status change must have a later p_enrol_stat_beg_dt than the row it replaces
scenarios.expected_outcome: Full status history preserved across p_enrol_stat_tb rows, current status reflecting either Active or Inactive

scenarios.name: System Reference List Validation Lookup
scenarios.description: Query providers matching a system list (e.g. G1-1009) and fetch their name, provider type, description from r_vv_tb or valid value table, list values, and related reference data. Handles lookups of valid value descriptions for provider type codes, license codes, or any domain-keyed code.
insert_sequence: 1. Identify the system list domain name from r_list_hdr_tb using r_list_num (e.g. 'P_CLIA_CERT_TY_CD' for list 1009).
2. Join provider.p_dtl_tb (demographics: p_first_nam, p_last_nam, p_nam) to child tables on p_sys_id.

3. For provider type description: JOIN provider.p_ty_tb ON p_dtl_tb.p_sys_id = p_ty_tb.p_sys_id, then JOIN provider.r_vv_tb ON p_ty_tb.p_ty_cd = r_vv_tb.r_vv_cd AND r_vv_tb.r_vv_domain_nam = 'P_TY_CD'.

4. For license/cert description: JOIN provider.p_lic_cert_tb ON p_dtl_tb.p_sys_id = p_lic_cert_tb.p_sys_id, then JOIN provider.r_vv_tb ON p_lic_cert_tb.p_lic_cert_ty_cd = r_vv_tb.r_vv_cd AND r_vv_tb.r_vv_domain_nam = 'P_CLIA_CERT_TY_CD'.

5. Join provider.r_list_dtl_tb on r_list_dtl_tb.r_list_num = 1009 and r_list_dtl_tb.r_func_area_cd = 'P1' to filter code values (e.g. p_lic_cert_ty_cd = r_list_dtl_tb.r_list_beg_value OR p_ty_cd = r_list_dtl_tb.r_list_beg_value).
6. CRITICAL: p_dtl_tb does NOT have a column named p_vv_cd. NEVER join p_dtl_tb directly to r_vv_tb. Always go through p_ty_tb or p_lic_cert_tb.
business_validations: Validate coded values against allowed list range values: r_list_beg_value / r_list_end_value
Domain name constraints must be matched: r_vv_domain_nam must equal the system list domain name
p_dtl_tb has NO column p_vv_cd - join r_vv_tb only through p_ty_tb.p_ty_cd or p_lic_cert_tb.p_lic_cert_ty_cd
scenarios.expected_outcome: Providers and their types/licensing codes retrieved along with matching valid value description labels.
scenarios.example_sql: SELECT p.p_first_nam, p.p_last_nam, pty.p_ty_cd AS provider_type, vv.r_vv_short_desc AS type_description FROM provider.p_dtl_tb p INNER JOIN provider.p_ty_tb pty ON p.p_sys_id = pty.p_sys_id LEFT JOIN provider.r_list_dtl_tb r ON pty.p_ty_cd = r.r_list_beg_value AND r.r_list_num = 1009 AND r.r_func_area_cd = 'P1' LEFT OUTER JOIN provider.r_vv_tb vv ON pty.p_ty_cd = vv.r_vv_cd AND vv.r_vv_domain_nam = 'P_TY_CD';
